chapter_title.en: The Names of Allah, the Exalted,‬‬ and the Difference between their Meanings and the Meaning of the‬‬ Names of Creation

text: 5 - وبهذا الإسناد، عن محمد بن سنان قال: سألته عن الاسم ما هو؟ قال: صفة لموصوف.

en.sayed-ali-raza-rizvi: 5. And with this chain of narration, on the authority of Muhammad ibn Sinan that I asked him (AS) “What is a name?” He said: ”It is an attribute for the attributed.”
